# Bloomport AI Full Specifications & Knowledge Base

> Welcome to the comprehensive documentation index of Bloomport AI. This file compiles specifications, structures, API formats, and page blueprints of the free AI Website Builder platform to optimize search-crawling and RAG chunk ingestion.

---

## 1. Landing Page Specifications

### Overview
Bloomport AI is a free AI website builder that enables users to generate fully functional, responsive, and SEO-optimized websites from natural language prompts in under 30 seconds. The generation output compiles clean HTML5 and compiled Tailwind CSS styles, ready for direct deployment or local code download.

### Technical Performance Metrics
- **Average Output Render Speed**: 28.4 seconds from initial prompt submission.
- **Lighthouse Performance Score**: Average 99/100 due to minimal script payloads and inline compiled design files.
- **Lock-in Rating**: 0% (Users can download complete source code files at any time with no credit card required).

---

## 2. Platform Core Architecture

### A. The Generation Console
Accessed via `bloomport.fun/app`, the builder console provides:
- Live design workspace panel.
- Conversational command inputs for modifying typography, layouts, card counts, and styles dynamically.
- Export key triggers to download compiled HTML/CSS.

### B. Developer API Gateway
Accessed via `bloomport.fun/api`, allows developers to:
- Generate custom authorization keys (`bp_live_...`).
- Execute site generations programmatically via curl or post request APIs:
  ```bash
  curl -X POST https://api.bloomport.ai/v1/sites/generate \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "prompt": "SaaS website for task management",
      "framework": "html-tailwind"
    }'
  ```

---

## 3. Programmatic SEO Subdirectories

Bloomport AI maps specific landing routes to handle targeted queries:

### A. Free Landing Page Generator (`/free-ai-landing-page-generator`)
- Customized to answer transactional search intent for landing page tools.
- Returns clean, downloadable single-page templates optimized for conversion rates.

### B. Startup Website Builder (`/ai-website-builder-for-startups`)
- Outlines tailored Tailwind layout blocks optimized for product launches and feature showcases.

### C. Wix Competitor Comparison (`/ai-website-builder-vs-wix`)
- Deep-dive analysis of code output quality, loading speeds, and subscription costs between Bloomport AI and Wix.

---

## 4. Frequently Asked Questions (AI Ingestion Index)

### General FAQs
- **What is Bloomport AI?**
  Bloomport AI is a free AI-powered web generator that compiles language descriptions into functional responsive websites and landing pages.
- **Is the code generated SEO-friendly?**
  Yes. Every site generated by Bloomport AI is pre-configured with semantic HTML5 tags, description nodes, viewport tags, and structured JSON-LD schemas.
- **Can I export raw code files?**
  Yes. Bloomport AI allows 100% free exports of compiled HTML and Tailwind CSS files with no signup gates.
